playlist_title: Sunset Rumba Pump | Ultimate Latin Gym Workout Music
playlist_description: A high-energy, sunset-drenched workout journey blending intense Latin rhythms, deep rumba percussion, and modern club energy. Designed to take your gym session from warm-up to peak beast mode with serious tropical heat.
playlist_strategy: Gradual BPM and energy build starting from warm-up Latin house, peaking at hard-hitting guaracha and reggaeton, and resolving into an acoustic-electronic cooldown.

tracks.title: Golden Hour Stretch
tracks.youtube_title: TROPICAL HEAT 🌅 Latina Sunset Warm-Up | Gym Music
tracks.style_summary: Smooth Latin House with rhythmic congas and warm chords
tracks.song_structure: Intro -> Build -> Drop -> Break -> Drop -> Outro
tracks.music_generation_prompt: Instrumental gym workout music with hi-fi modern production quality. Genre: Latin House. Subgenre: Sunset Rumba House. BPM: 105. Key: A minor. Groove description: Smooth, pulsing four-on-the-floor beat with syncopated conga rhythms perfect for a warm-up. Bass style: Deep, rolling sub-bass that locks with the kick. Drum pattern: Organic Latin percussion blended with electronic house drums. Synth textures: Warm, sweeping pads and muted plucks evoking a sunset glow. Arrangement hints: Gradual build, adding layers of percussion. Strong hook within first 5 seconds: A catchy marimba melody that grabs attention instantly. Gym motivation vibe: Energizing yet relaxed, setting the pace for a sunset workout. High energy dynamics. Hi-fi modern production quality. Clean professional mastering. The track must sound like commercial release quality gym music.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic gym photography, athletic fitness aesthetic. Waist-up athlete framing of a fit woman doing dynamic stretches at an outdoor beach gym during golden hour sunset. Sweaty workout realism, modern gym clothing, bright coral sports top. One strong central subject, clear focal point. High contrast lighting, warm sunset rim lighting, sweat highlights. Shallow depth of field, subtle cinematic 3D depth, atmospheric ocean haze in the background. Space around the subject for parallax animation. Vibrant, striking, readable on mobile.
tracks.youtube_description: Start your sunset workout with this smooth Latin House warm-up track! 🌅 Feel the tropical rumba rhythms energize your body as you prepare for an intense session. Perfect for stretching and light cardio. Get ready to sweat! 🔥 #LatinHouse #GymMusic #WarmUp #WorkoutMusic #SunsetGym
